column3: What type of area do you come from?

column7: Who mainly pays for your college ?
column8: How has your background impacted your college experience?
column9: Have you faced any problems related to your background that affected your college performance?
column10: How far is your hometown from your college?

column16: Are you passionate about your chosen engineering field?

column18: What part of engineering are you most excited about?
column19: How do you stay motivated during challenging courses?
column20: Would you consider pursuing postgraduate studies in your field?
column21: How do you think you'll use what you learn in engineering to help fix things in the real world?
column22: Have you considered any specific specialization within your chosen engineering field?
column23: What role do internships or co-op experiences play in your educational and career plans?
column24: Have you ever participated in engineering competitions or hackathons?
column25: How do you stay updated with the latest advancements and trends in your field?
column26: Do you have a mentor or role model in your field of study?
column27: How would you rate your technical skills in your field?
column28: have you participated in any extracurricular activities related to your field?
column29: How would you describe your academic performance throughout your months in college?
column30: How do you balance your time between your college studies and the activities you do outside of classes?
column31: Are there any specific skills you wish to develop further before graduating?
column32: Have you been involved in any collaborative projects with students from different academic backgrounds?
column33: How much do you think making connections with other people is helpful for doing well in your job area?
column34: How do you approach group projects or assignments in your courses?
column35: Do you utilise any specific software or tools relevant to your field outside of your coursework?
column36: How do you deal with things that might keep you from focusing when you're studying or doing homework?
column37: Have you ever considered studying abroad as part of your academic journey?
column38: Are you involved in any leadership roles or student organizations related to your field?
column39: How do you figure out if the information you find for your college projects is trustworthy?
column40: How do you handle big projects or assignments that take a long time?
column41: Do you enjoy your engineering coursework?
column42: What aspect of engineering do you find most enjoyable?
column43: How satisfied are you with your overall engineering education?
column44: How do extracurricular activities contribute to your overall college experience?
column45: What do you do if there's a problem or argument in your group project?
column46: In what ways has your perception of engineering changed from your first day to today ?
column47: Do you like to try out what you learn in real life?
column48: Have you experienced stress during your engineering studies?
column49: How do you cope with stress?
column50: Do you feel proud of what you've done so far in engineering?
column51: How do you make sure you have time for both college stuff and fun stuff when you're really busy with college?
column52: Have you ever felt like you don't belong or aren't good enough in your engineering studies?
column53: How supportive do you find the college resources in addressing mental health concerns?
column54: Are there specific academic or personal achievements that have positively impacted your emotional well-being?
column55: If given the opportunity to choose a different field other than engineering, would you:

column58: Do you know that sometimes it can be hard to find a job in engineering when the economy is not doing well?
column59: How do you think you'll handle it if it's tough to find a job in engineering after you finish college?
column60: Do you have another plan if things don't work out the way you want in engineering?
column61: Have you considered pursuing further education or additional skills outside of engineering to enhance your career flexibility?
column62: How do you perceive the importance of having a backup plan for your career?
column63: Do you engage in any regular physical exercise or fitness activities?
column64: How would you describe your current dietary habits?
